title: Extract Phone Numbers from a String
scenario: Write a prompt that takes a string containing phone numbers in different formats (e.g., '123-456-7890', '123 456 7890', '+1 123 456 7890') and extracts the phone numbers. The output should be a list of extracted phone numbers.
constraints: Must be under 30 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid Python code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (Python solution and under 30 lines of code).
The code should correctly extract the phone numbers from the input string.
